vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-560: RallyClient Effect service crashes on dashboard startup in v0.6.0

plan.title: RallyClient Effect service crashes on dashboard startup in v0.6.0
plan.author: agent:minimax-m2.7-highspeed

narratives.Problem: Dashboard server crashes on startup with Fiber.runLoop error because RallyClientOptionalLive passes a raw Service tag to Effect.provide instead of a valid Effect
narratives.Proposal: Replace Layer.effect + broken delegation with Layer.unwrap + Effect.gen, which properly handles conditional Layer returns (stub when unconfigured, RallyClientLive when configured)

narrative.Action: Replace Layer.effect + yield* RallyClient.pipe(Effect.provide(RallyClientLive)) with Layer.unwrap + Effect.gen that conditionally returns Layer.succeed (stub) or RallyClientLive

subItems.title: RallyClientOptionalLive returns TrackerNotConfigured when Rally is not configured
